name: hourly: a property with no hourly rates configured routes to overnight instead of quoting R0 (B9/F17, fail closed)
comment: A second guesthouse onboarded before its hourly pricing is set has blank rate fields. Quoting R0 or booking free would be a silent revenue hole, so the whole hourly feature switches off for that property and the guest is redirected to overnight — the same landing state as the >3hr case, so there is one recovery path rather than two. Deliberately checked at the entry point, before the duration menu is ever rendered: a menu with a broken option is worse than no menu. The rule is all-or-nothing per property — the unit tests cover partially-configured and zero-valued variants.

includes: short stays aren't available at New Lodge
